functional_audit.check: DashboardMicroCommitments mounts in greeting row below greeting card and quick actions (layout_notes)
bTJGH RepeatingGroup binds focused_m_commitment_custom_pathsession from active pathenrollment1 via Supabase client
pathenrollment1 absent in prototype schema — API falls back to profiles.onboarding_data.path_enrollment1 with Bubble field keys
bTJGe Mark as Completed triggers bTJGk ChangeThing parity — append completed list and remove session from focused list
Widget collapses when focused session list is empty (Bubble collapse_when_hidden on bTJFv/bTJGA)

ui_evidence.notes: Root Group_transparent_ column layout with gap-2; nests heading + RG
Static copy matches IR: Your current micro-commitments
RepeatingGroup_list_ with flex-wrap horizontal chip list per layout_notes
Group_transparent_ row cell; no invented border/bg chrome (C-2 resolved)
Text_body_ with bold path name + session index + micro_commitment text

gaps: pathenrollment1 and custom.pathsession tables are absent from supabase migrations; session metadata resolved from static paths.ts catalog keyed by onboarding_data session IDs
Widget remains hidden until PATHS enrollment (or manual onboarding_data seed) populates focused_m_commitment_custom_pathsession — intentional Bubble empty-state parity

critiques.finding: Completed-state branch renders CheckCircle2 + Completed label, but Bubble IR only exposes bTJGe for in-focus sessions; bTJGk workflow removes completed sessions from focused_m_commitment_custom_pathsession so they leave the RG rather than showing a completed badge.
critiques.alternative: Drop the isCompleted display branch and rely on list removal after markMicroCommitmentCompleted refresh, matching Bubble RG semantics.

critiques.finding: End-to-end micro-commitment visibility depends on PATHS enrollment writing path_enrollment1 into profiles.onboarding_data because pathenrollment1 table is not provisioned in the prototype schema.
critiques.alternative: Land pathenrollment1 migration in supabase or document explicit test seed for QA verification.

critiques.finding: Component returns null during loading as well as when empty, which may briefly suppress the greeting-row slot before data resolves.
critiques.alternative: Render bTJFv shell with skeleton or defer collapse until loading completes.
